case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. CARMEN ALEMAN et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-03-2009 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-03-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT ALEMAN, CARMEN DOES 1 TO 5, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-13-2009

CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING JUN-03-2009 AT 1:30PM. THIS DISMISSAL IS PURSUANT TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: MARIA LERTORA CSR# 11935 (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
